stories.title: News24 | JSE hits a 10% correction as Iran war hurts emerging markets
stories.summary: The JSE has dropped 10% as the ongoing war in Iran is shaking up emerging markets. This downturn could have a ripple effect on South Africa's economy, impacting investments and job security.

stories.title: News24 | WATCH | SANDF continues Gauteng crackdown for third day, targeting illegal mining
stories.summary: The SANDF is ramping up its crackdown on illegal mining in Gauteng, continuing operations for a third day. This move aims to tackle the crime and chaos associated with illegal mining activities.

stories.title: Kgosientsho Ramokgopa under fire
stories.description: The Department of Electricity and Energy says that South Africa is waiting on its latest power strategy due to disagreements with Spain.
stories.summary: Kgosientsho Ramokgopa is facing criticism as South Africa awaits a new power strategy amid ongoing energy issues. The delays are raising concerns about potential power shortages and rising costs.

stories.title: SA Post Office on the verge of collapse
stories.description: The South African Post Office's business rescue practitioners (BRPs) intend to liquidate the state-owned company.
stories.summary: The South African Post Office is on the brink of collapse, with plans for liquidation underway. This could affect postal services and jobs across the country.

stories.title: ELECTRICITY CRISIS: Nelson Mandela Bay councillors walk out of critical electricity meeting amid widespread blackouts
stories.description: Nelson Mandela Bay’s electricity committee collapsed after ANC councillors walked out when the department head left, amid ongoing citywide power outages.
stories.summary: In Nelson Mandela Bay, councillors walked out of a crucial electricity meeting due to ongoing blackouts. This highlights the city's struggle with power supply issues and political tensions.

stories.title: One government decision that could end in disaster for South Africa
stories.description: An energy economist warned that years of government inaction have left the country dangerously exposed to rising prices and potential shortages.
stories.summary: An energy economist warns that South Africa's years of inaction could lead to a disaster with rising energy prices and shortages. This situation is critical for households and businesses alike.

stories.title: News24 | Ukraine finds new role as protector of US, Gulf allies amid Iran war
stories.summary: The conflict in Ukraine is evolving as the country positions itself as a protector for the US and Gulf allies amid the Iran war. This shift could have significant geopolitical implications.

stories.title: 100 countries South Africans can travel to visa-free
stories.description: South African passport holders can now visit 100 countries without a visa, down from 101 in January, ranking the South African passport 47th globally.
stories.summary: South African passport holders can now visit 100 countries without a visa, though this is a slight decline from earlier this year. This news is a mixed bag for travelers looking for hassle-free trips.

stories.title: Netflix show made in South Africa hits number 1 worldwide — renewed for another season
stories.description: The second season of the live-action One Piece series has proven popular among Netflix audiences globally.
stories.summary: A South African Netflix show has hit number one worldwide and has been renewed for another season. This success showcases the growing influence of South African content on global platforms.

stories.title: News24 | High-profile wildlife trafficker arrested in staged rhino horn theft case
stories.summary: A high-profile wildlife trafficker has been arrested in a staged rhino horn theft case, highlighting the ongoing battle against wildlife crime in South Africa. This arrest could deter future illegal activities.
